title: helianthemum oelandicum subsp. alpestre
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. alpestre, also known as alpine rockrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. alpestre include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and potentially aiding in the management of certain health conditions such as hypertension and diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its uses and potential benefits.
